name: NetRecon
description: Browser-based security toolkit for pentesters and security researchers. Requires local companion agent.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:31337 ws://127.0.0.1:31337; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:
